calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Luis Molina for Maria Cervantes (Petitioner), who was present in court

Mr. Molina stated the Trust terminated the joint tenancy but did not execute the deed transferring title, per the Will interest in community property was to go to the spouse, that the Will was not prepared by an attorney, heirs of decedent (5 adult children) are in favor of this petition and consent can be submitted if necessary. The Spousal Petition is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Leslie Gomez. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Continued To Apr-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
